Rustic Hospitality: Can receive shelter from common folk

Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) +4 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3

Languages: Common; Draconic; Infernal; Sylvan
Skill Notes:
Acolyte Of Nature: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Animal Handling, Nature, Survival)
Draconic Bloodline: Language (Draconic)
Speech Of The Woods: Language (Sylvan)
Awakened Mind: R30' Can communicate telepathically with any creature that knows a language
Divine Sense: R60' Can discern the location of celestials, fiends, undead, consecration, and desecration until the end of the next turn 2 times per long rest
Draconic Bloodline: +2 on proficient Charisma checks with dragons
Druidic: Speaks a secret language known only by druids
Favored Enemy: Has advantage on Survival to track and on Intelligence to recall info about 1 chosen creature type and can learn a language it speaks
Natural Explorer: In 1 chosen terrain types, gains +2 on related proficient Intelligence and Wisdom skills, moves normally through difficult terrain, never becomes lost, always remains alert, can stealth alone at full speed, locates twice the amount of food when foraging, and gains extra info from tracking
Speech Of The Woods: Can communicate with beasts
Combat
Hit Points: 122 Initiative: +1 Armor Class: 15
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Club; Dagger; Dart; Hand Crossbow; Javelin; Light Crossbow; Longsword; Mace; Martial Weapons; Quarterstaff; Rapier; Scimitar; Shortsword; Sickle; Simple Weapons; Sling; Spear
Armor: Chain Shirt Shield: None Weapons: Heavy Crossbow (+5 1d10+1 P R100/400); Quarterstaff (+4 1d6+2 B [2h d8]); Rapier (+4 1d8+2 P); Unarmed Strike (+4 1+2 B)

Bonus Proficiency (Nature Domain): Armor Proficiency (Heavy)
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +54
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Draconic Resilience: +2 Hit Points/+3 Armor Class in no armor
Fighting Style (Archery): +2 attacks with Ranged weapons
Fighting Style (Defense): +1 Armor Class in armor
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Bardic Inspiration: R60' Can use a bonus action once per long rest to give an ally +1d6 on an ability check, attack, or save within 10 min
Divine Smite: Can expend a spell slot after a successful melee attack to inflict 1d8 HP radiant plus 1d8 HP per slot level, up to a maximum of 5d8 HP; undead and fiends suffer an additional 1d8 HP
Turn The Faithless: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make fiends and fey flee (save DC 11 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 12 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution; Dexterity; Intelligence; Strength; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +5; Dexterity: +3; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +4
Save Notes: Divine Health: Has immunity to disease
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: B0: 2; B: 5; C0: 3; C: 4; D0: 3; D: 4; K0: 2; K: 3; P: 3; R: 2; S0: 4; S: 3; W0: 5; W: 4 Spell Slots: B1: 3; C1: 3; D1: 3; K1: 2; P1: 3; R1: 2; S1: 3; W1: 3 Attack: B: +3; C: +4; D: +4; K: +3; P: +3; R: +4; S: +3; W: +3 Spell DC: B: 11; C: 12; D: 12; K: 11; P: 11; R: 12; S: 11; W: 11
Spells:
Abi-Dalzim's Horrid Wilting (S8 Necr): (Action) R150' 30' cube withers plants and inflicts 12d8 HP necrotic on creatures (save Constitution half; plants and water elementals have disadvantage)
Abi-Dalzim's Horrid Wilting (W8 Necr): (Action) R150' 30' cube withers plants and inflicts 12d8 HP necrotic on creatures (save Constitution half; plants and water elementals have disadvantage)
Absorb Elements (D1 Abju): (Reaction) Cast as a reaction to suffering acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, gives resistance to that type of damage until the start of the next turn and causes the the first melee attack during that turn to inflict +1d6 HP of that type (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Absorb Elements (R1 Abju): (Reaction) Cast as a reaction to suffering acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, gives resistance to that type of damage until the start of the next turn and causes the the first melee attack during that turn to inflict +1d6 HP of that type (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Absorb Elements (S1 Abju): (Reaction) Cast as a reaction to suffering acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, gives resistance to that type of damage until the start of the next turn and causes the the first melee attack during that turn to inflict +1d6 HP of that type (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Absorb Elements (W1 Abju): (Reaction) Cast as a reaction to suffering acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, gives resistance to that type of damage until the start of the next turn and causes the the first melee attack during that turn to inflict +1d6 HP of that type (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Aganazzar's Scorcher (S2 Evoc): (Action) 5'x30' line inflicts 3d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Aganazzar's Scorcher (W2 Evoc): (Action) 5'x30' line inflicts 3d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Animal Friendship (C1 [Nature Domain Spells] Ench): (Action) R30' Convinces target beast that self is harmless (save Wisdom negates; Intelligence 4 or higher immune) for 24 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Beast Bond (D1 Divi): (Action) Touched friendly beast with Intelligence up to 3 gains a telepathic link with self and advantage on attacks on foes adjacent to self for concentration up to 10 min
Beast Bond (R1 Divi): (Action) Touched friendly beast with Intelligence up to 3 gains a telepathic link with self and advantage on attacks on foes adjacent to self for concentration up to 10 min
Bones Of The Earth (D6 Tran): (Action) R120' Creates 6 5' diameter, 30' high pillars that can pin creatures between the top of a pillar and the ceiling, inflicting 6d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity negates; additional Dexterity or Strength saves each rd free) (+Level creates +2 pillars)
Catapult (S1 Tran): (Action) R60' Hurls a 5 lb target object 90', inflicting 3d8 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity negates) (+Level hurls +5 lb, inflicting +1d8 HP)
Catapult (W1 Tran): (Action) R60' Hurls a 5 lb target object 90', inflicting 3d8 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity negates) (+Level hurls +5 lb, inflicting +1d8 HP)
Catnap (B3 Ench): (Action) R30' 3 willing targets sleep for 10 min or until shaken or damaged; sleeping the full time gives the benefits of a short rest and prevents repeating the spell on the target until after their next long rest (+Level affects +1 target)
Catnap (S3 Ench): (Action) R30' 3 willing targets sleep for 10 min or until shaken or damaged; sleeping the full time gives the benefits of a short rest and prevents repeating the spell on the target until after their next long rest (+Level affects +1 target)
Catnap (W3 Ench): (Action) R30' 3 willing targets sleep for 10 min or until shaken or damaged; sleeping the full time gives the benefits of a short rest and prevents repeating the spell on the target until after their next long rest (+Level affects +1 target)
Cause Fear (K1 Necr): (Action) R60' Target becomes frightened of self (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Cause Fear (W1 Necr): (Action) R60' Target becomes frightened of self (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Ceremony (C1 Abju): (Hour) Performs a ceremony of Atonement (DC 20 Insight restores alignment to a target), Bless Water (creates a vial of holy water), Coming Of Age (gives a young adult target +1d4 on ability checks for 24 hr), Dedication (gives a target +1d4 on saves for 24 hr), Funeral Rite (prevents a corpse from becoming undead for 7 days), or Marriage (gives a couple +2 Armor Class when within 30' of each other for 7 days)
Ceremony (P1 Abju): (Hour) Performs a ceremony of Atonement (DC 20 Insight restores alignment to a target), Bless Water (creates a vial of holy water), Coming Of Age (gives a young adult target +1d4 on ability checks for 24 hr), Dedication (gives a target +1d4 on saves for 24 hr), Funeral Rite (prevents a corpse from becoming undead for 7 days), or Marriage (gives a couple +2 Armor Class when within 30' of each other for 7 days)
Chaos Bolt (S1 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8+1d6 HP of a random type: acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, poison, psychic, or thunder; matching numbers on the d8s indicates that the spell attacks another target within 30' of the first (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Charm Monster (B4 Ench): (Action) R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage) for 1 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Charm Monster (D4 Ench): (Action) R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage) for 1 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Charm Monster (K4 Ench): (Action) R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage) for 1 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Charm Monster (S4 Ench): (Action) R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage) for 1 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Charm Monster (W4 Ench): (Action) R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage) for 1 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Control Flames (D0 Tran): (Action) R60' Target flame up to a 5' cube expands 5', snuffs, doubles or halves its lighted area for 1 hr, or forms shapes for 1 hr
Control Flames (S0 Tran): (Action) R60' Target flame up to a 5' cube expands 5', snuffs, doubles or halves its lighted area for 1 hr, or forms shapes for 1 hr
Control Flames (W0 Tran): (Action) R60' Target flame up to a 5' cube expands 5', snuffs, doubles or halves its lighted area for 1 hr, or forms shapes for 1 hr
Control Winds (D5 Tran): (Action) R300' Air in a 100' cube creates gusts (can inflict disadvantage on ranged attacks and half movement), a downdraft (knocks prone flying creatures (save Strength negates) and inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks), or an updraft (reduces damage from falling by half and gives +10' jumps) for concentration up to 1 hr
Control Winds (S5 Tran): (Action) R300' Air in a 100' cube creates gusts (can inflict disadvantage on ranged attacks and half movement), a downdraft (knocks prone flying creatures (save Strength negates) and inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks), or an updraft (reduces damage from falling by half and gives +10' jumps) for concentration up to 1 hr
Control Winds (W5 Tran): (Action) R300' Air in a 100' cube creates gusts (can inflict disadvantage on ranged attacks and half movement), a downdraft (knocks prone flying creatures (save Strength negates) and inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks), or an updraft (reduces damage from falling by half and gives +10' jumps) for concentration up to 1 hr
Create Bonfire (D0 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates a 5' fire that inflicts 4d8 HP fire (save Dexterity negates) and ignites flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min
Create Bonfire (K0 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates a 5' fire that inflicts 4d8 HP fire (save Dexterity negates) and ignites flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min
Create Bonfire (S0 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates a 5' fire that inflicts 4d8 HP fire (save Dexterity negates) and ignites flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min
Create Bonfire (W0 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates a 5' fire that inflicts 4d8 HP fire (save Dexterity negates) and ignites flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min
Create Homunculus (W6 Tran): (Hour) 1 hr process inflicts 2d4 HP piercing on self to create a magical companion
Crown Of Stars (K7 Evoc): (Action) Creates 7 flames around self; each can be used within 1 hr to make a ranged touch attack inflicting 4d12 HP radiant, and 1 or 4 remaining flames emit a 30' dim or bright light (+Level creates +2 flames)
Crown Of Stars (S7 Evoc): (Action) Creates 7 flames around self; each can be used within 1 hr to make a ranged touch attack inflicting 4d12 HP radiant, and 1 or 4 remaining flames emit a 30' dim or bright light (+Level creates +2 flames)
Crown Of Stars (W7 Evoc): (Action) Creates 7 flames around self; each can be used within 1 hr to make a ranged touch attack inflicting 4d12 HP radiant, and 1 or 4 remaining flames emit a 30' dim or bright light (+Level creates +2 flames)
Danse Macabre (K5 Necr): (Action) R60' Creates from corpses 5 obedient skeletons and zombies that attack at +1 for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level creates +2 undead)
Danse Macabre (W5 Necr): (Action) R60' Creates from corpses 5 obedient skeletons and zombies that attack at +1 for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level creates +2 undead)
Dawn (C5 Evoc): (Action) R60' Creates a 30' radius of bright sunlight that inflicts 4d10 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn when within 60' to move it 60'
Dawn (W5 Evoc): (Action) R60' Creates a 30' radius of bright sunlight that inflicts 4d10 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn when within 60' to move it 60'
Dragon's Breath (S2 Tran): (Bonus) Touched can exhale a 15' cone of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison, inflicting 3d6 HP (save Dexterity half), for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Dragon's Breath (W2 Tran): (Bonus) Touched can exhale a 15' cone of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison, inflicting 3d6 HP (save Dexterity half), for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Druid Grove (D6 Abju): (10 Minutes) Touched 90' cube responds to intruders with choices of entanglement, fog that inflicts heavy obscurement and reduction of Speed by 2/3, attacks from 4 awakened trees, Gust Of Wind, Spike Growth, and Wind Wall (password negates) for 24 hr; casting every day for a year makes the effects permanent
Dust Devil (D2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube heavily obscures a 10' radius when over loose material and inflicts 1d8 HP bludgeoning and a 10' push (save Strength half HP only) on adjacent creatures; can use bonus actions to move it move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Dust Devil (S2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube heavily obscures a 10' radius when over loose material and inflicts 1d8 HP bludgeoning and a 10' push (save Strength half HP only) on adjacent creatures; can use bonus actions to move it move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Dust Devil (W2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube heavily obscures a 10' radius when over loose material and inflicts 1d8 HP bludgeoning and a 10' push (save Strength half HP only) on adjacent creatures; can use bonus actions to move it move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Earth Tremor (B1 Evoc): (Action) 10' emanation knocks prone and inflicts 1d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity negates) and inflicts difficult terrain if made from loose earth or stone (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Earth Tremor (D1 Evoc): (Action) 10' emanation knocks prone and inflicts 1d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity negates) and inflicts difficult terrain if made from loose earth or stone (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Earth Tremor (S1 Evoc): (Action) 10' emanation knocks prone and inflicts 1d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity negates) and inflicts difficult terrain if made from loose earth or stone (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Earth Tremor (W1 Evoc): (Action) 10' emanation knocks prone and inflicts 1d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity negates) and inflicts difficult terrain if made from loose earth or stone (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Earthbind (D2 Tran): (Action) R300' Reduces the target's fly Speed to 0 (save Strength negates), causing a flying target to descend 60' per rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Earthbind (K2 Tran): (Action) R300' Reduces the target's fly Speed to 0 (save Strength negates), causing a flying target to descend 60' per rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Earthbind (S2 Tran): (Action) R300' Reduces the target's fly Speed to 0 (save Strength negates), causing a flying target to descend 60' per rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Earthbind (W2 Tran): (Action) R300' Reduces the target's fly Speed to 0 (save Strength negates), causing a flying target to descend 60' per rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Elemental Bane (D4 Tran): (Action) R90' Target loses resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder and suffers +2d6 HP from the first hit of that damage type each turn (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Elemental Bane (K4 Tran): (Action) R90' Target loses resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder and suffers +2d6 HP from the first hit of that damage type each turn (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Elemental Bane (W4 Tran): (Action) R90' Target loses resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder and suffers +2d6 HP from the first hit of that damage type each turn (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Enemies Abound (B3 Ench): (Action) R120' Target regards all creatures as enemies and attacks randomly (save Intelligence negates; additional saves after taking damage end) for concentration up to 1 min
Enemies Abound (K3 Ench): (Action) R120' Target regards all creatures as enemies and attacks randomly (save Intelligence negates; additional saves after taking damage end) for concentration up to 1 min
Enemies Abound (S3 Ench): (Action) R120' Target regards all creatures as enemies and attacks randomly (save Intelligence negates; additional saves after taking damage end) for concentration up to 1 min
Enemies Abound (W3 Ench): (Action) R120' Target regards all creatures as enemies and attacks randomly (save Intelligence negates; additional saves after taking damage end) for concentration up to 1 min
Enervation (K5 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d6 HP necrotic each turn, and self regains half of the amount inflicted, for concentration up to 1 min (save Dexterity inflicts 2d6 HP once and restores half of that amount) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Enervation (S5 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d6 HP necrotic each turn, and self regains half of the amount inflicted, for concentration up to 1 min (save Dexterity inflicts 2d6 HP once and restores half of that amount) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Enervation (W5 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d6 HP necrotic each turn, and self regains half of the amount inflicted, for concentration up to 1 min (save Dexterity inflicts 2d6 HP once and restores half of that amount) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Ensnaring Strike (P1 [Oath Of The Ancients Spells] Conj): (Bonus) Next successful self weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min restrains the foe and inflicts 1d6 HP piercing each rd until the spell ends (save Strength negates; Large creatures have advantage on the save, and additional saves each rd end) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Erupting Earth (D3 Tran): (Action) R120' 20' cube inflicts 3d12 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and difficult terrain (+Level inflicts +1d12 HP)
Erupting Earth (S3 Tran): (Action) R120' 20' cube inflicts 3d12 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and difficult terrain (+Level inflicts +1d12 HP)
Erupting Earth (W3 Tran): (Action) R120' 20' cube inflicts 3d12 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and difficult terrain (+Level inflicts +1d12 HP)
Far Step (K5 Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 60'; can use bonus actions to teleport an additional 60' each turn for concentration up to 1 min
Far Step (S5 Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 60'; can use bonus actions to teleport an additional 60' each turn for concentration up to 1 min
Far Step (W5 Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 60'; can use bonus actions to teleport an additional 60' each turn for concentration up to 1 min
Find Greater Steed (P4 Conj): (10 Minutes) R30' Summons a mount with at least 6 Intelligence that can understand 1 language and communicate telepathically with self within 1 mile until dismissed or reduced to 0 hit points; self spells can be extended to include the mount
Flame Arrows (D3 Tran): (Action) 12 pieces of ammunition in a touched quiver each inflict +1d6 HP fire for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +2 pieces)
Flame Arrows (R3 Tran): (Action) 12 pieces of ammunition in a touched quiver each inflict +1d6 HP fire for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +2 pieces)
Flame Arrows (S3 Tran): (Action) 12 pieces of ammunition in a touched quiver each inflict +1d6 HP fire for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +2 pieces)
Flame Arrows (W3 Tran): (Action) 12 pieces of ammunition in a touched quiver each inflict +1d6 HP fire for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +2 pieces)
Frostbite (D0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d6 HP cold and disadvantage on its next weapon attack before the end of its next turn (save Constitution negates)
Frostbite (K0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d6 HP cold and disadvantage on its next weapon attack before the end of its next turn (save Constitution negates)
Frostbite (S0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d6 HP cold and disadvantage on its next weapon attack before the end of its next turn (save Constitution negates)
Frostbite (W0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d6 HP cold and disadvantage on its next weapon attack before the end of its next turn (save Constitution negates)
Guardian Of Nature (D4 Tran): (Bonus) Changes self into a Primal Beast with +10 Speed, 120' Darkvision, advantage on Strength attacks, and +1d6 HP force from melee weapons, or into a Great Tree with 10 temporary hit points, advantage on Constitution saves, advantage on Dexterity and Wisdom attacks, and a 15' radius that inflicts difficult terrain on foes, for concentration up to 1 min
Guardian Of Nature (R4 Tran): (Bonus) Changes self into a Primal Beast with +10 Speed, 120' Darkvision, advantage on Strength attacks, and +1d6 HP force from melee weapons, or into a Great Tree with 10 temporary hit points, advantage on Constitution saves, advantage on Dexterity and Wisdom attacks, and a 15' radius that inflicts difficult terrain on foes, for concentration up to 1 min
Gust (D0 Tran): (Action) R30' Pushes a Medium or smaller target creature 5' (save Strength negates), pushes an unattended 5 lb object 10', or creates a light breeze
Gust (S0 Tran): (Action) R30' Pushes a Medium or smaller target creature 5' (save Strength negates), pushes an unattended 5 lb object 10', or creates a light breeze
Gust (W0 Tran): (Action) R30' Pushes a Medium or smaller target creature 5' (save Strength negates), pushes an unattended 5 lb object 10', or creates a light breeze
Healing Spirit (D2 Conj): (Bonus) R60' Allies in a 5' cube regain 1d6 HP during each of their turns for concentration up to 1 min, to a maximum of 3 healings; can use a bonus action each turn to move the effect 30' (+Level heals +1d6 HP)
Healing Spirit (R2 Conj): (Bonus) R60' Allies in a 5' cube regain 1d6 HP during each of their turns for concentration up to 1 min, to a maximum of 3 healings; can use a bonus action each turn to move the effect 30' (+Level heals +1d6 HP)
Holy Weapon (C5 Evoc): (Bonus) Touched weapon becomes magic, emits a 30' bright light, and inflicts +2d8 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 hr; dismissal inflicts 4d8 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min on targets in a 30' radius (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Holy Weapon (P5 Evoc): (Bonus) Touched weapon becomes magic, emits a 30' bright light, and inflicts +2d8 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 hr; dismissal inflicts 4d8 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min on targets in a 30' radius (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Ice Knife (D1 Conj): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold)
Ice Knife (S1 Conj): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold)
Ice Knife (W1 Conj): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold)
Illusory Dragon (W8 Illu): (Action) R120' Illusionary shadow dragon frightens for 1 min (save Wisdom negates; additional saves when out of sight end) and is immune to damage; can use a bonus action each turn to move it 60' and inflict 7d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, or poison (chosen when the spell is cast) in a 60' cone (save Intelligence half; successful Investigation gives advantage) for concentration up to 1 min
Immolation (S5 Evoc): (Action) R90' Target emits a 30' bright light and suffers 8d6 HP fire, then 4d6 HP fire each rd (save Dexterity half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Immolation (W5 Evoc): (Action) R90' Target emits a 30' bright light and suffers 8d6 HP fire, then 4d6 HP fire each rd (save Dexterity half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Infernal Calling (K5 Conj): (Minute) R90' Summons a CR 6 or lower devil that obeys commands in alignment with its desires or on a successful Charisma vs. Insight check (knowing its true name gives advantage, and possessing its talisman makes the check unnecessary) for concentration up to 1 hr or until it is reduced to 0 hit points; failure on a check makes the devil immune to additional commands and allows it to remain for 3d6 min after concentration is broken (+Level summons a +1 CR devil)
Infernal Calling (W5 Conj): (Minute) R90' Summons a CR 6 or lower devil that obeys commands in alignment with its desires or on a successful Charisma vs. Insight check (knowing its true name gives advantage, and possessing its talisman makes the check unnecessary) for concentration up to 1 hr or until it is reduced to 0 hit points; failure on a check makes the devil immune to additional commands and allows it to remain for 3d6 min after concentration is broken (+Level summons a +1 CR devil)
Infestation (D0 Conj): (Action) R30' Target suffers 4d6 HP poison and moves 5' in a random direction without triggering opportunity attacks (save Constitution negates)
Infestation (K0 Conj): (Action) R30' Target suffers 4d6 HP poison and moves 5' in a random direction without triggering opportunity attacks (save Constitution negates)
Infestation (S0 Conj): (Action) R30' Target suffers 4d6 HP poison and moves 5' in a random direction without triggering opportunity attacks (save Constitution negates)
Infestation (W0 Conj): (Action) R30' Target suffers 4d6 HP poison and moves 5' in a random direction without triggering opportunity attacks (save Constitution negates)
Investiture Of Flame (D6 Tran): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright light, gains immunity to fire and resistance to cold, inflicts 1d10 HP fire in a 5' radius, and can inflict 4d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) in a 15'x5' line, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Flame (K6 Tran): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright light, gains immunity to fire and resistance to cold, inflicts 1d10 HP fire in a 5' radius, and can inflict 4d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) in a 15'x5' line, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Flame (S6 Tran): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright light, gains immunity to fire and resistance to cold, inflicts 1d10 HP fire in a 5' radius, and can inflict 4d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) in a 15'x5' line, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Flame (W6 Tran): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright light, gains immunity to fire and resistance to cold, inflicts 1d10 HP fire in a 5' radius, and can inflict 4d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) in a 15'x5' line, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Ice (D6 Tran): (Action) Self gains immunity to cold and resistance to fire, moves normally across ice and snow, inflicts difficult terrain in a 10' radius, and can inflict 4d6 HP cold and half speed until the start of the next turn (save Dexterity half HP only) in a 15' cone, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Ice (K6 Tran): (Action) Self gains immunity to cold and resistance to fire, moves normally across ice and snow, inflicts difficult terrain in a 10' radius, and can inflict 4d6 HP cold and half speed until the start of the next turn (save Dexterity half HP only) in a 15' cone, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Ice (S6 Tran): (Action) Self gains immunity to cold and resistance to fire, moves normally across ice and snow, inflicts difficult terrain in a 10' radius, and can inflict 4d6 HP cold and half speed until the start of the next turn (save Dexterity half HP only) in a 15' cone, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Ice (W6 Tran): (Action) Self gains immunity to cold and resistance to fire, moves normally across ice and snow, inflicts difficult terrain in a 10' radius, and can inflict 4d6 HP cold and half speed until the start of the next turn (save Dexterity half HP only) in a 15' cone, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Stone (D6 Tran): (Action) Self gains resistance to non-magical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, can inflict knocked prone (save Dexterity negates) in a 15' radius, moves normally across earth and stone difficult terrain, and can pass through earth and stone, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Stone (K6 Tran): (Action) Self gains resistance to non-magical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, can inflict knocked prone (save Dexterity negates) in a 15' radius, moves normally across earth and stone difficult terrain, and can pass through earth and stone, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Stone (S6 Tran): (Action) Self gains resistance to non-magical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, can inflict knocked prone (save Dexterity negates) in a 15' radius, moves normally across earth and stone difficult terrain, and can pass through earth and stone, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Stone (W6 Tran): (Action) Self gains resistance to non-magical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, can inflict knocked prone (save Dexterity negates) in a 15' radius, moves normally across earth and stone difficult terrain, and can pass through earth and stone, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Wind (D6 Tran): (Action) Inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks vs. self, and self gains a 60' fly Speed and can make a R60' attack that inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning in a 15' cube and a 10' push on Large or smaller creatures, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Wind (K6 Tran): (Action) Inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks vs. self, and self gains a 60' fly Speed and can make a R60' attack that inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning in a 15' cube and a 10' push on Large or smaller creatures, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Wind (S6 Tran): (Action) Inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks vs. self, and self gains a 60' fly Speed and can make a R60' attack that inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning in a 15' cube and a 10' push on Large or smaller creatures, for concentration up to 10 min
Investiture Of Wind (W6 Tran): (Action) Inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks vs. self, and self gains a 60' fly Speed and can make a R60' attack that inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning in a 15' cube and a 10' push on Large or smaller creatures, for concentration up to 10 min
Invulnerability (W9 Abju): (Action) Gives self immunity to all damage for concentration up to 10 min
Life Transference (C3 Necr): (Action) R30' Inflicts 4d8 HP necrotic on self and restores twice that amount to the target (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Life Transference (W3 Necr): (Action) R30' Inflicts 4d8 HP necrotic on self and restores twice that amount to the target (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Maddening Darkness (K8 Evoc): (Action) R150' 60' radius magical darkness inflicts 8d8 HP psychic per rd (save Wisdom half) for concentration up to 10 min
Maddening Darkness (W8 Evoc): (Action) R150' 60' radius magical darkness inflicts 8d8 HP psychic per rd (save Wisdom half) for concentration up to 10 min
Maelstrom (D5 Evoc): (Action) R120' 30' radius of swirling water inflicts 6d6 HP bludgeoning and pulls creatures 10' toward its center (save Strength negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Magic Stone (D0 Tran): (Bonus) 3 touched stones can each be thrown within 1 min for a +2 attack that inflicts 1d6+2 HP bludgeoning
Magic Stone (K0 Tran): (Bonus) 3 touched stones can each be thrown within 1 min for a +1 attack that inflicts 1d6+1 HP bludgeoning
Mass Polymorph (B9 Tran): (Action) R120' 10 targets transform into beasts (save Wisdom negates; shapeshifters automatically succeed) of equal or lesser CR and gain temporary hit points appropriate to the beast for concentration up to 1 hr or until the temporary hit points are lost
Mass Polymorph (S9 Tran): (Action) R120' 10 targets transform into beasts (save Wisdom negates; shapeshifters automatically succeed) of equal or lesser CR and gain temporary hit points appropriate to the beast for concentration up to 1 hr or until the temporary hit points are lost
Mass Polymorph (W9 Tran): (Action) R120' 10 targets transform into beasts (save Wisdom negates; shapeshifters automatically succeed) of equal or lesser CR and gain temporary hit points appropriate to the beast for concentration up to 1 hr or until the temporary hit points are lost
Maximilian's Earthen Grasp (S2 Tran): (Action) R30' Earthen hand inflicts 2d6 HP bludgeoning and restrains (save Strength negates); can inflict an additional 2d6 HP bludgeoning on a restrained creature (save Strength half; additional saves each rd escape), or release to attack a different target, each turn for concentration up to 1 min
Maximilian's Earthen Grasp (W2 Tran): (Action) R30' Earthen hand inflicts 2d6 HP bludgeoning and restrains (save Strength negates); can inflict an additional 2d6 HP bludgeoning on a restrained creature (save Strength half; additional saves each rd escape), or release to attack a different target, each turn for concentration up to 1 min
Melf's Minute Meteors (S3 Evoc): (Action) R120' 6 meteors each inflict 2d6 HP fire (maximum 2 per rd) within concentration up to 10 min (+Level creates +2 meteors)
Melf's Minute Meteors (W3 Evoc): (Action) R120' 6 meteors each inflict 2d6 HP fire (maximum 2 per rd) within concentration up to 10 min (+Level creates +2 meteors)
Mental Prison (K6 Illu): (Action) R60' Target suffers 5d6 HP psychic and becomes trapped by an illusionary danger (save Intelligence HP only) for concentration up to 1 min; the target touching the danger inflicts 10d6 HP psychic and ends the spell
Mental Prison (S6 Illu): (Action) R60' Target suffers 5d6 HP psychic and becomes trapped by an illusionary danger (save Intelligence HP only) for concentration up to 1 min; the target touching the danger inflicts 10d6 HP psychic and ends the spell
Mental Prison (W6 Illu): (Action) R60' Target suffers 5d6 HP psychic and becomes trapped by an illusionary danger (save Intelligence HP only) for concentration up to 1 min; the target touching the danger inflicts 10d6 HP psychic and ends the spell
Mighty Fortress (W8 Conj): (Minute) R1 mile Creates a 120' sq turreted fortress and keep, staffed by invisible servants, for 7 days or until cast again; casting every 7 days for a year makes it permanent
Mind Spike (K2 Divi): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Mind Spike (S2 Divi): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Mind Spike (W2 Divi): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Mold Earth (D0 Tran): (Action) R30' Excavates a 5' cube of earth, or colors and inscribes or changes the movement difficulty of one for 1 hr
Mold Earth (S0 Tran): (Action) R30' Excavates a 5' cube of earth, or colors and inscribes or changes the movement difficulty of one for 1 hr
Mold Earth (W0 Tran): (Action) R30' Excavates a 5' cube of earth, or colors and inscribes or changes the movement difficulty of one for 1 hr
Negative Energy Flood (K5 Necr): (Action) R60' Inflicts 5d12 necrotic (save Constitution half) on a living target that, if slain, rises as a zombie and attacks the nearest creature; an undead target gains half of 5d12 temporary hit points
Negative Energy Flood (W5 Necr): (Action) R60' Inflicts 5d12 necrotic (save Constitution half) on a living target that, if slain, rises as a zombie and attacks the nearest creature; an undead target gains half of 5d12 temporary hit points
Power Word Pain (K7 Ench): (Action) R60' Target with up to 100 hit points slows to 10' Speed, suffers disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and non-Constitution saves, and requires a successful Constitution save to cast a spell (save Constitution each rd ends)
Power Word Pain (S7 Ench): (Action) R60' Target with up to 100 hit points slows to 10' Speed, suffers disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and non-Constitution saves, and requires a successful Constitution save to cast a spell (save Constitution each rd ends)
Power Word Pain (W7 Ench): (Action) R60' Target with up to 100 hit points slows to 10' Speed, suffers disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and non-Constitution saves, and requires a successful Constitution save to cast a spell (save Constitution each rd ends)
Primal Savagery (D0 Tran): (Action) Melee spell attack inflicts 4d10 HP acid
Primordial Ward (D6 Abju): (Action) Self gains resistance to acid, cold, fire, lightning, and thunder for concentration up to 1 min; can dismiss as a reaction upon taking damage of one of these types to gain immunity to it until the end of the turn
Psychic Scream (B9 Ench): (Action) R90' 10 targets with Intelligence 3 or higher suffer 14d6 HP psychic and stunned (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Psychic Scream (K9 Ench): (Action) R90' 10 targets with Intelligence 3 or higher suffer 14d6 HP psychic and stunned (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Psychic Scream (S9 Ench): (Action) R90' 10 targets with Intelligence 3 or higher suffer 14d6 HP psychic and stunned (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Psychic Scream (W9 Ench): (Action) R90' 10 targets with Intelligence 3 or higher suffer 14d6 HP psychic and stunned (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Pyrotechnics (B2 Tran): (Action) R60' Snuffs a 5' target fire and causes it to emit fireworks, blinding creatures within 10' (save Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn, or smoke that heavily obscures a 20' radius for 1 min
Pyrotechnics (S2 Tran): (Action) R60' Snuffs a 5' target fire and causes it to emit fireworks, blinding creatures within 10' (save Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn, or smoke that heavily obscures a 20' radius for 1 min
Pyrotechnics (W2 Tran): (Action) R60' Snuffs a 5' target fire and causes it to emit fireworks, blinding creatures within 10' (save Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn, or smoke that heavily obscures a 20' radius for 1 min
Scatter (K6 Conj): (Action) R30' Teleports 5 targets 120' (save Wisdom negates), each to a different location
Scatter (S6 Conj): (Action) R30' Teleports 5 targets 120' (save Wisdom negates), each to a different location
Scatter (W6 Conj): (Action) R30' Teleports 5 targets 120' (save Wisdom negates), each to a different location
Shadow Blade (K2 Illu): (Bonus) Creates a shadow sword with the finesse, light, and thrown (range 20/60) properties that gives advantage on attacks in dim light and inflicts 2d8 HP psychic for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases damage to 3d8, 4d8, or 5d8 HP at level 3, 5, or 7)
Shadow Blade (S2 Illu): (Bonus) Creates a shadow sword with the finesse, light, and thrown (range 20/60) properties that gives advantage on attacks in dim light and inflicts 2d8 HP psychic for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases damage to 3d8, 4d8, or 5d8 HP at level 3, 5, or 7)
Shadow Blade (W2 Illu): (Bonus) Creates a shadow sword with the finesse, light, and thrown (range 20/60) properties that gives advantage on attacks in dim light and inflicts 2d8 HP psychic for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases damage to 3d8, 4d8, or 5d8 HP at level 3, 5, or 7)
Shadow Of Moil (K4 Necr): (Action) 10' emanation dims light, gives self resistance to radiant, and inflicts 2d8 HP necrotic on a successful attacker for concentration up to 1 min
Shape Water (D0 Tran): (Action) R30' 5' cube of water forms animated shapes, changes color or opacity, or freezes for 1 hr or changes flow 5'
Shape Water (S0 Tran): (Action) R30' 5' cube of water forms animated shapes, changes color or opacity, or freezes for 1 hr or changes flow 5'
Shape Water (W0 Tran): (Action) R30' 5' cube of water forms animated shapes, changes color or opacity, or freezes for 1 hr or changes flow 5'
Sickening Radiance (K4 Evoc): (Action) R120' 30' radius causes creatures to emit a dim glow and suffer 4d10 HP radiant and 1 level of exhaustion (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 10 min
Sickening Radiance (S4 Evoc): (Action) R120' 30' radius causes creatures to emit a dim glow and suffer 4d10 HP radiant and 1 level of exhaustion (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 10 min
Sickening Radiance (W4 Evoc): (Action) R120' 30' radius causes creatures to emit a dim glow and suffer 4d10 HP radiant and 1 level of exhaustion (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 10 min
Skill Empowerment (B5 Tran): (Action) Willing touched gains expertise in a chosen proficient skill for concentration up to 1 hr
Skill Empowerment (S5 Tran): (Action) Willing touched gains expertise in a chosen proficient skill for concentration up to 1 hr
Skill Empowerment (W5 Tran): (Action) Willing touched gains expertise in a chosen proficient skill for concentration up to 1 hr
Skywrite (B2 Tran): (Action) Clouds form 10 words for concentration up to 1 hr
Skywrite (D2 Tran): (Action) Clouds form 10 words for concentration up to 1 hr
Skywrite (W2 Tran): (Action) Clouds form 10 words for concentration up to 1 hr
Snare (D1 Abju): (Action) Touched hidden magical trap (Intelligence detects) restrains the first Small, Medium, or Large creature to cross it within 8 hr (save Dexterity negates; additional saves and Arcana checks end)
Snare (R1 Abju): (Action) Touched hidden magical trap (Intelligence detects) restrains the first Small, Medium, or Large creature to cross it within 8 hr (save Dexterity negates; additional saves and Arcana checks end)
Snare (W1 Abju): (Action) Touched hidden magical trap (Intelligence detects) restrains the first Small, Medium, or Large creature to cross it within 8 hr (save Dexterity negates; additional saves and Arcana checks end)
Snilloc's Snowball Swarm (S2 Evoc): (Action) R90' 5' radius inflicts 3d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Snilloc's Snowball Swarm (W2 Evoc): (Action) R90' 5' radius inflicts 3d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Soul Cage (K6 Necr): (Reaction) R60' Allows using a trapped dying soul 6 times within 8 hr to regain 2d8 HP, truthfully answer a question, gain advantage on an attack, ability check, or save, or scry a location familiar to the soul for 10 min
Soul Cage (W6 Necr): (Reaction) R60' Allows using a trapped dying soul 6 times within 8 hr to regain 2d8 HP, truthfully answer a question, gain advantage on an attack, ability check, or save, or scry a location familiar to the soul for 10 min
Speak With Animals (C1 [Nature Domain Spells] Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (P1 [Oath Of The Ancients Spells] Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Steel Wind Strike (R5 Conj): (Action) R30' Melee spell attack inflicts 6d10 HP force on each of 5 targets and teleports self to a spot adjacent to one of them
Steel Wind Strike (W5 Conj): (Action) R30' Melee spell attack inflicts 6d10 HP force on each of 5 targets and teleports self to a spot adjacent to one of them
Storm Sphere (S4 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 2d6 HP bludgeoning (save Strength negates) and disadvantage on listening Perception within 30' for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn for a R60' ranged spell attack, with advantage if the target is within the radius, that inflicts 4d6 HP lightning (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP bludgeoning and lightning)
Storm Sphere (W4 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 2d6 HP bludgeoning (save Strength negates) and disadvantage on listening Perception within 30' for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn for a R60' ranged spell attack, with advantage if the target is within the radius, that inflicts 4d6 HP lightning (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP bludgeoning and lightning)
Summon Greater Demon (K4 Conj): (Action) R60' Summons a demon up to CR 5 that obeys commands (save Charisma ends; speaking the true name inflicts disadvantage) or attacks the nearest attacker for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points; the demon lingers for 1d6 rd if concentration ends early (+Level summons a +1 CR demon)
Summon Greater Demon (W4 Conj): (Action) R60' Summons a demon up to CR 5 that obeys commands (save Charisma ends; speaking the true name inflicts disadvantage) or attacks the nearest attacker for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points; the demon lingers for 1d6 rd if concentration ends early (+Level summons a +1 CR demon)
Summon Lesser Demons (K3 Conj): (Action) R60' Summons 2 CR 1, 4 CR 1/2, or 8 CR 1/4 demons that each attack the nearest non-demon for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points (+Level doubles or triples the number of demons at level 6 or 8)
Summon Lesser Demons (W3 Conj): (Action) R60' Summons 2 CR 1, 4 CR 1/2, or 8 CR 1/4 demons that each attack the nearest non-demon for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points (+Level doubles or triples the number of demons at level 6 or 8)
Synaptic Static (B5 Ench): (Action) R120' Creatures with an Intelligence of 3 or higher in a 20' radius suffer 8d6 HP psychic and -1d6 attacks, ability checks, and concentration checks for 1 min (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Synaptic Static (K5 Ench): (Action) R120' Creatures with an Intelligence of 3 or higher in a 20' radius suffer 8d6 HP psychic and -1d6 attacks, ability checks, and concentration checks for 1 min (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Synaptic Static (S5 Ench): (Action) R120' Creatures with an Intelligence of 3 or higher in a 20' radius suffer 8d6 HP psychic and -1d6 attacks, ability checks, and concentration checks for 1 min (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Synaptic Static (W5 Ench): (Action) R120' Creatures with an Intelligence of 3 or higher in a 20' radius suffer 8d6 HP psychic and -1d6 attacks, ability checks, and concentration checks for 1 min (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Temple Of The Gods (C7 Conj): (Hour) R120' Creates a 120' sq temple that bars divination, ethereal travel, and choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead (save Charisma inflicts -1d4 attacks, ability checks, and saves) and gives a +2 bonus to healing for 24 hr; casting every day for a year makes it permanent
Tenser's Transformation (W6 Tran): (Action) Self gains 50 temporary hit points, advantage on simple and martial weapon attacks, +2d12 HP force weapon damage, Armor Proficiency (Light; Heavy; Shield), Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons), Save Proficiency (Constitution; Strength), and 2 attacks per Attack action, while losing the ability to cast spells, for concentration up to 10 min; inflicts 1 level of exhaustion afterward (save DC 15 Constitution negates)
Thunder Step (K3 Conj): (Action) Teleports self and 1 willing adjacent creature 90' and inflicts 3d10 HP thunder in a 10' radius around the starting position (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Thunder Step (S3 Conj): (Action) Teleports self and 1 willing adjacent creature 90' and inflicts 3d10 HP thunder in a 10' radius around the starting position (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Thunder Step (W3 Conj): (Action) Teleports self and 1 willing adjacent creature 90' and inflicts 3d10 HP thunder in a 10' radius around the starting position (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Thunderclap (B0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 4d6 HP thunder
Thunderclap (D0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 4d6 HP thunder
Thunderclap (K0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 4d6 HP thunder
Thunderclap (S0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 4d6 HP thunder
Thunderclap (W0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 4d6 HP thunder
Tidal Wave (D3 Conj): (Action) R120' 30'x10' area inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning and knocked prone (save Dexterity half HP only) and extinguishes flames within 30'
Tidal Wave (S3 Conj): (Action) R120' 30'x10' area inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning and knocked prone (save Dexterity half HP only) and extinguishes flames within 30'
Tidal Wave (W3 Conj): (Action) R120' 30'x10' area inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning and knocked prone (save Dexterity half HP only) and extinguishes flames within 30'
Tiny Servant (W3 Tran): (Minute) Touched Tiny object sprouts arms and legs, animates (Armor Class 15; 10 hit points; 30' Speed and climb Speed; +5 slam inflicts 1d4+3 bludgeoning), and obeys commands when within 120' for 8 hr (+Level animates +2 objects)
Toll The Dead (C0 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d8 HP necrotic, or 4d12 HP necrotic if previously damaged (save Wisdom negates)
Toll The Dead (K0 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d8 HP necrotic, or 4d12 HP necrotic if previously damaged (save Wisdom negates)
Toll The Dead (W0 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d8 HP necrotic, or 4d12 HP necrotic if previously damaged (save Wisdom negates)
Transmute Rock (D5 Tran): (Action) R120' Changes a 40' cube of rock to mud, inflicting restrained on creatures standing on it (save Strength negates; using an action ends), 1/4 movement, and 4d8 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) if it falls on a creature, or changes a 40' cube of mud to rock, restraining creatures standing in it (save Dexterity negates; DC 20 Strength ends)
Transmute Rock (W5 Tran): (Action) R120' Changes a 40' cube of rock to mud, inflicting restrained on creatures standing on it (save Strength negates; using an action ends), 1/4 movement, and 4d8 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) if it falls on a creature, or changes a 40' cube of mud to rock, restraining creatures standing in it (save Dexterity negates; DC 20 Strength ends)
Vitriolic Sphere (S4 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d4 HP acid, then 5d4 HP acid at the end of each affected creature's next turn (save Dexterity half initial HP only) (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP initial)
Vitriolic Sphere (W4 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d4 HP acid, then 5d4 HP acid at the end of each affected creature's next turn (save Dexterity half initial HP only) (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP initial)
Wall Of Light (K5 Evoc): (Action) R120' 60'x10'x5' wall emits a 120' bright light and inflicts 4d8 HP radiant and blinded for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 10 min; can emit a 60' ray each rd that inflicts 4d8 HP radiant and shortens the wall by 10' (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Light (S5 Evoc): (Action) R120' 60'x10'x5' wall emits a 120' bright light and inflicts 4d8 HP radiant and blinded for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 10 min; can emit a 60' ray each rd that inflicts 4d8 HP radiant and shortens the wall by 10' (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Light (W5 Evoc): (Action) R120' 60'x10'x5' wall emits a 120' bright light and inflicts 4d8 HP radiant and blinded for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 10 min; can emit a 60' ray each rd that inflicts 4d8 HP radiant and shortens the wall by 10' (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Sand (W3 Evoc): (Action) R90' 30'x10'x10' wall inflicts 1/3 Speed and blocks vision for concentration up to 10 min
Wall Of Water (D3 Evoc): (Action) R60' 30'x10'x1' wall or 20'x20'x1' ring creates difficult terrain, inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks, reduces fire effects by half, and turns to ice from cold effects for concentration up to 10 min
Wall Of Water (S3 Evoc): (Action) R60' 30'x10'x1' wall or 20'x20'x1' ring creates difficult terrain, inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks, reduces fire effects by half, and turns to ice from cold effects for concentration up to 10 min
Wall Of Water (W3 Evoc): (Action) R60' 30'x10'x1' wall or 20'x20'x1' ring creates difficult terrain, inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks, reduces fire effects by half, and turns to ice from cold effects for concentration up to 10 min
Warding Wind (B2 Evoc): (Action) 10' emanation deafens, extinguishes unprotected flames, disperses gas and fog, inflicts difficult terrain on others, and inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks for concentration up to 10 min
Warding Wind (D2 Evoc): (Action) 10' emanation deafens, extinguishes unprotected flames, disperses gas and fog, inflicts difficult terrain on others, and inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks for concentration up to 10 min
Warding Wind (S2 Evoc): (Action) 10' emanation deafens, extinguishes unprotected flames, disperses gas and fog, inflicts difficult terrain on others, and inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks for concentration up to 10 min
Warding Wind (W2 Evoc): (Action) 10' emanation deafens, extinguishes unprotected flames, disperses gas and fog, inflicts difficult terrain on others, and inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks for concentration up to 10 min
Watery Sphere (D4 Conj): (Action) R90' 10' diameter water sphere traps 1 Large or 4 Medium targets (save Strength negates; additional saves each rd end); can hover 10' and move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min, after which it bursts, knocking prone any restrained targets and extinguishing flames within 30'
Watery Sphere (S4 Conj): (Action) R90' 10' diameter water sphere traps 1 Large or 4 Medium targets (save Strength negates; additional saves each rd end); can hover 10' and move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min, after which it bursts, knocking prone any restrained targets and extinguishing flames within 30'
Watery Sphere (W4 Conj): (Action) R90' 10' diameter water sphere traps 1 Large or 4 Medium targets (save Strength negates; additional saves each rd end); can hover 10' and move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min, after which it bursts, knocking prone any restrained targets and extinguishing flames within 30'
Whirlwind (D7 Evoc): (Action) R300' 10' radius inflicts restrained on Large or smaller creatures and 10d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half HP only; save Strength negates restrained, and additional Strength or Dexterity saves each rd eject a restrained creature and throw it 3d6x10'), pulling restrained creatures upward 5' each turn to a maximum of 30'; can move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min
Whirlwind (S7 Evoc): (Action) R300' 10' radius inflicts restrained on Large or smaller creatures and 10d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half HP only; save Strength negates restrained, and additional Strength or Dexterity saves each rd eject a restrained creature and throw it 3d6x10'), pulling restrained creatures upward 5' each turn to a maximum of 30'; can move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min
Whirlwind (W7 Evoc): (Action) R300' 10' radius inflicts restrained on Large or smaller creatures and 10d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half HP only; save Strength negates restrained, and additional Strength or Dexterity saves each rd eject a restrained creature and throw it 3d6x10'), pulling restrained creatures upward 5' each turn to a maximum of 30'; can move 30' each turn for concentration up to 1 min
Word Of Radiance (C0 Evoc): (Action) R5' Targets suffer 4d6 HP radiant (save Constitution negates)
Wrath Of Nature (D5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Animates a 60' cube of nature to attack foes for concentration up to 1 min: trees inflict 4d6 HP slashing in a 10' radius (save Dexterity negates); undergrowth inflicts difficult terrain, vines restrain 1 target each turn (save Strength negates; Athletics checks each rd end), and a bonus action each turn causes rocks to inflict 3d8 HP bludgeoning and knocked prone on a target (save Strength HP only)
Wrath Of Nature (R5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Animates a 60' cube of nature to attack foes for concentration up to 1 min: trees inflict 4d6 HP slashing in a 10' radius (save Dexterity negates); undergrowth inflicts difficult terrain, vines restrain 1 target each turn (save Strength negates; Athletics checks each rd end), and a bonus action each turn causes rocks to inflict 3d8 HP bludgeoning and knocked prone on a target (save Strength HP only)
Zephyr Strike (R1 Tran): (Bonus) Self movement does not provoke opportunity attacks for concentration up to 1 min; can attack with advantage once during the spell, inflicting +1d8 HP force and gaining +30 Speed until the end of the turn
Magic Notes:
Acolyte Of Nature: Knows 1 Druid cantrip
Eldritch Invocations: 2 selections
Arcane Recovery: Can recover 1 spell slot level (level 5 maximum) at the end of a short rest once per long rest
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 2 times per short rest
Charm Animals And Plants: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to charm beasts and plants (save Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Conjuration Savant: Requires half the normal time and cost to copy conjuration spells into spellbook
Font Of Magic: Can use 2 sorcery points per long rest and can use a bonus action to convert between sorcery points and spell slots
Grasp Of Hadar: Eldritch Blast can pull the target 10' once per turn
Lay On Hands: Touch can heal 20 hit points per long rest; can use 5 hit points' worth to cure a disease or neutralize a poison
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Minor Conjuration: R10' Can create a 3' cube inanimate object weighing up to 10 lb that emits a 5' dim light and lasts for 1 hr or until it suffers or inflicts damage
Nature's Wrath: R10' Can use Channel Divinity to restrain a target (save DC 11 Dexterity or Strength negates; additional saves each rd end)
Pact Magic: Can cast spells from the Warlock spell list; regains expended spell slots after a short rest
Song Of Rest: Friendly listeners who spend Hit Dice to regain hit points after a short rest recover +1d6 hit points
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Spirit Totem (Bear): R60' Can use a bonus action to give targets in a 30' radius 7 temporary hit points and advantage on Strength for 1 min once per short rest; can use bonus actions to move the radius 60'
Spirit Totem (Hawk): R60' Can use a bonus action to give targets in a 30' radius advantage on Perception, and can use a reaction to give advantage on an attack, for 1 min once per short rest; can use bonus actions to move the radius 60'
Spirit Totem (Unicorn): R60' Can use a bonus action to give allies advantage to detect creatures in a 30' radius, and self heal spells also restore 2 hit points to targets in the same radius, for 1 min once per short rest; can use bonus actions to move the radius 60'
Wild Shape: Can transform into a CR 1/4 (land only) creature for 1 hr 2 times per short rest
Notes
Validation Errors:
Multiclass Requirements: Requires meeting the multiclass requirements for 3 additional chosen classes
Skill And Tool Proficiency Allocation: 23 available vs. 22 allocated
Skill Proficiency Allocation: 19 available vs. 18 allocated
